purpose: Record rank repairs needed before canonical conversion and public view generation.

rank_rules.C: meeting date and racecourse only; race times may be null
rank_rules.A: requires race-by-race detail rows in a detail source, plus first and last summary times when used in normalized summaries
rank_rules.A+: requires A fields plus allowed programme summary fields such as race_name, distance, surface, and course_label

repairs.reason: first_race_time_local is null, so this is meeting-date coverage only.
first_race_time_local is null, so this is meeting-date coverage only.
first_race_time_local and last_race_time_local are null in the normalized summary record. HKJC detail rows exist in a separate transitional sample, but this summary record itself cannot be B+.

kept_as_is.reason: summary first/last times are present, and a transitional public-safe detail module stores race-by-race post times. This still needs canonical/public detail conversion later.
